breakdown: This PR fixes rewards box visibility to include XP progress tracking (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) as visible content. The change is a single-line logical addition in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui with an updated docstring. However, no new tests specifically validate this XP progress tracking visibility, and test file changes only refactor imports/fixtures rather than adding coverage for the fix.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking to rewards box visibility check: or (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0)
Updated docstring to document XP progress tracking visibility condition
Test file refactoring: changed from world_logic_module._ensure_session_header_resources to session_header_utils.ensure_session_header_resources
Removed world_logic_module fixture dependency from multiple test functions
Updated function name references in test comments: ensure_level_up_rewards_pending -> _check_and_set_level_up_pending
